prompt: Create a delicate vertical romantic anime-style watercolor illustration of a young bride and a pale-haired young man standing very close in a sunlit interior, as if about to kiss or sharing a private breath. The bride is shown from behind and slightly in profile, with dark brown hair gathered into a loose low bun, many wispy strands, and an ornate white floral hair ornament with dangling pearl-like beads; she wears a sheer ivory wedding kimono or bridal robe with soft translucent fabric and fine sketched folds. The partner appears on the upper right edge, only partially visible with light blond or silver hair and a gentle lowered face. Cover the central face-contact area with one large opaque square censor block in warm beige, positioned over both faces and spanning the center-right of the image. Use a muted cream, beige, ivory, and pale gold palette, very soft backlighting, dusty sunbeams, faint floral wallpaper or window reflections in the background, and a quiet nostalgic atmosphere suggesting restrained longing and tenderness. The style should be fine-lined, airy, painterly, highly detailed in hair strands and accessories, with low contrast, translucent washes, and no visible text or watermark.
